trends.description: 宠物食品包装趋势持续增长
工厂幕后花絮视频热度上升
品牌方寻找环保包装方案

recommendations.title_en: How we make custom pet food packaging with flat bottom pouches
recommendations.title_cn: 我们如何生产定制宠物食品平底袋包装
recommendations.target_customer: pet food brands, premium pet food companies, co-packers
recommendations.hook: Your pet food deserves packaging that keeps it fresh and looks great on the shelf.
recommendations.script_en: When choosing flat bottom pouches for pet food, brands in Germany care about three things: material quality, print accuracy, and reliable sealing. We test every batch before it ships to make sure your product is protected. Custom flat bottom pouches with strong sealing, high barrier materials, and brand-quality printing help your product stand out.
recommendations.shot_list: ["Show flat bottom pouch close-up","Show printing process on machine","Show zipper and seal detail","Show pouch being filled with pet food","Show finished product on shelf"]
recommendations.shot_list_cn: ["展示平底袋特写","展示印刷机印刷过程","展示拉链和封口细节","展示袋子灌装宠物食品","展示成品在货架上的效果"]
recommendations.caption: Custom flat bottom pouches for pet food brands in Germany. Strong sealing, high barrier, shelf-ready. DM for samples!
recommendations.cta: Comment SAMPLE to get free pouch samples shipped to your door.

recommendations.title_en: Retort pouch production process: from raw material to finished bag
recommendations.title_cn: 蒸煮袋生产流程：从原材料到成品袋
recommendations.target_customer: ready meal brands, soup manufacturers, food processors
recommendations.hook: Ever wonder how retort pouches survive 121 degrees Celsius? Here is the process.
recommendations.script_en: This is how we make custom retort pouches. From material selection to printing, lamination, bag making, and quality inspection, every step is controlled in our factory. Retort pouches must withstand high-temperature sterilization while keeping food safe and fresh. We use multi-layer film structures designed for maximum barrier performance.
recommendations.shot_list: ["Show factory exterior","Show raw material film rolls","Show printing machine in action","Show lamination process","Show bag making machine","Show retort test chamber","Show finished retort pouches packed"]
recommendations.shot_list_cn: ["展示工厂外观","展示原材料薄膜卷","展示印刷机运转","展示复合工艺","展示制袋机","展示蒸煮测试舱","展示成品蒸煮袋打包"]
recommendations.caption: From raw material to finished retort pouch. Every step quality-controlled in our factory. DM for MOQ and pricing!
recommendations.cta: Drop a comment if you want to see our full quality test process.

inspiration_videos.title_or_note: flat bottom pouch filling and sealing process
inspiration_videos.first_second_hook: Close-up of a flat bottom pouch being filled with dry pet food
inspiration_videos.main_visual: Factory production line with bags moving on conveyor
inspiration_videos.why_good: 适合学习生产过程类视频的镜头顺序，可以改编成宠物食品平底袋的灌装、拉链和封口展示
inspiration_videos.what_to_learn: 镜头从空袋到灌装到封口的完整流程，节奏紧凑
inspiration_videos.what_not_to_copy: 不能使用对方工厂画面和客户品牌，只能用我们自己的袋子和工厂重新拍
inspiration_videos.how_to_adapt_for_factory: 用我们自己的平底袋，拍摄空袋展示、倒入干粮、展示拉链、展示封口和多尺寸组合
inspiration_videos.transferable_points: 生产流程类视频的镜头编排方式、从空袋到成品的完整展示逻辑
inspiration_videos.adaptation_method: 用我们自己的平底袋和工厂产线，按照相同镜头顺序重新拍摄
inspiration_videos.adaptation_risk: 低风险，直接使用自有产品和工厂
inspiration_videos.soft_packaging_version: 宠物食品平底袋版本：展示灌装、拉链封口、多规格组合

inspiration_videos.first_second_hook: Hand holding a sealed pouch, pulling the seal apart
inspiration_videos.main_visual: Close-up of seal being tested with force
inspiration_videos.why_good: 适合学习用测试画面建立信任，可以改编成蒸煮袋封口强度和耐高温应用说明
inspiration_videos.what_to_learn: 用实际测试画面代替文字承诺，更有说服力
inspiration_videos.what_not_to_copy: 不能使用对方的测试设备画面和产品，只能用我们自己的蒸煮袋和测试设备
inspiration_videos.how_to_adapt_for_factory: 用我们自己的蒸煮袋做封口拉力测试、高温蒸煮测试，展示测试前后对比
inspiration_videos.transferable_points: 用测试实验建立产品信任的方法论、近景特写展示质量细节的技巧
inspiration_videos.adaptation_method: 用我们自己的蒸煮袋和测试设备，拍摄封口拉力测试和高温蒸煮测试
inspiration_videos.adaptation_risk: 低风险，使用自有产品和自有测试设备
inspiration_videos.soft_packaging_version: 蒸煮袋耐温测试版本：封口拉力测试、121°C蒸煮测试、前后对比
